# Use Case Contribution

## Case metadata

- Source URL:
- Author handle and profile URL:
- English title:
- Reader-action takeaway:
- Source-grounded notes:
- Type (`Demo`, `Tutorial`, `Evaluation`, `Integration`, `Benchmark`, or `Limit`):
- Date (`YYYY-MM-DD`):
- Category:
- Dedup key:
- Decision reason:
- Exact public prompt boundary, if any:

## Checklist

- [ ] The case is a real public workflow, demo, integration, evaluation, benchmark, or limitation
- [ ] I did not invent prompts, setup steps, results, prices, dates, or attribution
- [ ] The source URL is not already present in `data/use-cases.json`
- [ ] README, structured data, menu counts, anchors, and numbering agree
- [ ] All localized README files contain translated titles, takeaways, and notes
- [ ] Source URL, author URL, type, date, model ID, code, and prompt text match English
- [ ] Public media uses the approved R2 image/video policy
- [ ] `python3 scripts/verify_repository.py` passes
